vulnerabilities.title: Hardcoded AWS Secret Key
vulnerabilities.description: An AWS Access Key was detected in plain text.
vulnerabilities.remediation: Move secrets to environment variables (.env) or Secret Manager.

vulnerabilities.title: SQL Injection Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.description: User input is being concatenated directly into a SQL query string.
vulnerabilities.remediation: Use parameterized queries (prepared statements) instead of f-strings.
